name: Warrior
description: A battle-hardened veteran with high durability and weapon mastery.
ability_desc: Gains Cleave at level 1 — hits all enemies for reduced damage

name: Rogue
description: A cunning shadow-dancer who avoids danger and finds extra gold.
ability_desc: Gains Backstab at level 1 — extra damage when target is distracted

name: Mage
description: A scholar of forbidden magic who sacrifices health for power.
ability_desc: Gains Firebolt at level 1 — ranged 1d10 magic damage

name: Paladin
description: A holy knight blessed with divine light and healing power.
ability_desc: Gains Lay on Hands at level 1 — heal 50% HP once per rest
